objective: Strategie de Momentum sur BTCUSDC 1h. Indicateurs : EMA(20), OBV, ATR. Entree short sur volume croissant + tendance baissiere (EMA). Stop-loss = 1.5x ATR, take-profit = 3.0x ATR.

iterations.hypothesis: Fallback contractuel: proposition générée automatiquement pour maintenir la progression quand la sortie LLM n'est pas exploitable.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy is based on Momentum, EMA(20), OBV and ATR indicators. It enters long when momentum increases with controlled risk and exits upon reversal or invalidation of this trend. The fallback contract will be used if the lowest LO (Logical Operator) condition isn't met. Results are not yet known for this strategy.
[Backup plan] 1. Weaknesses include potential overfitting, lack of robustness to market conditions, and high transaction costs. 2. If results are poor, adjusting stop-loss or take profit could be considered. Alternatively, reevaluating the logic behind entry signals may help improve performance. 3. Modifying parameters such as EMA length or volume indicators might enhance Sharpe ratio. 4. A different approach such as mean reversion strategy or trend following method can be explored if this one fails.
